emails.body: Re: Financial swap re PJM wholesale power Hi Sara, yes I sent this to David and I thought I copied you on it. I can't find it in my e-mail I must have deleted it. If he still needs it I can re-send it. Thanks, Melissa From: Sara Shackleton on 09/06/2000 02:16 PM
